title: Application for Bonafide Certificate
cleaned_text:
Approved / NotApproved 
 
Rajiv Gandhi College of Engineering and Technology 
Kirumampakkam, Puducherry

Branch CSE / IT / MECH / ECE / EEE / BME / MBA / MCA 
Year & Semester Y1/Y2/Y3/Y4 S1/S2/S3/S4/S5/S6/S7/S8 
Quota CENTAC / MANAGEMENT 
Purpose of Applying 
(Passport/Educational Loan/Scholarship/ 
Fees Structure/Others specify 
 
 
Enclose Supporting Documents: 
1. Aadhaar Xerox-1 
2. Recent Passport Size Photo (Blazer coat with tie for Boys and Chudidar for Girls) - 2nos 
3. 10th& 12th Marksheet xerox copy-1set (Applicable only for passport) 
4. Birth Certificate Xerox Copy-1 (Applicable only for Passport) 
Student Signature 
 
REMARKS OF THE HOD & SIGNATURE 
Conduct and Character

Academic Performance 
 
 
For Principal’s Office Use 
 
 
 
PRINCIPAL
